width.description:
The request image width. Must be an integer between 1 and 10000.
*Only one pair of parameters "width"/"height" or "resx"/"resy" must be set at the same time.*

height.description:
The request image height. Must be an integer between 1 and 10000.
*Only one pair of parameters "width"/"height" or "resx"/"resy" must be set at the same time.*

resx.description:
Spatial resolution of the request image in a horizontal direction. Its units are defined by the CRS given in "input.bounds.properties.crs" parameter.
*Only one pair of parameters "width"/"height" or "resx"/"resy" must be set at the same time.*

resy.description:
Spatial resolution of the request image in a vertical direction. Its units are defined by the CRS given in "input.bounds.properties.crs" parameter.
*Only one pair of parameters "width"/"height" or "resx"/"resy" must be set at the same time.*
